core_mechanism: mesh-free Lagrangian particle discretization of continuum field equations, in which field values and their spatial derivatives at any location are reconstructed by kernel-weighted (smoothing-convolution) interpolation over co-moving sample points
brief_reason: The abstract centers on the Smoothed Particle Hydrodynamics method as a numerical scheme for evolving ideal-gas/continuum dynamics via meshless kernel-based derivatives applied to moving particles, which is the transferable machinery independent of the compact-object subject matter.
